scripts.ios:pods:local: node scripts/ensure-cocoapods.cjs && cd ios && pod install
scripts.ios:local:setup: npm run ios:prepare:local && npm run ios:pods:local
scripts.ios:sim:local: npm run ios:local:setup && xcodebuild -workspace ios/Arnold.xcworkspace -scheme Arnold -configuration Debug -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 16e' build
scripts.ios:archive:local: npm run ios:local:setup && xcodebuild -workspace ios/Arnold.xcworkspace -scheme Arnold -configuration Release -destination 'generic/platform=iOS' -archivePath ios/build/Arnold.xcarchive archive
scripts.ios:native:archive: cd ios && xcodebuild -workspace Arnold.xcworkspace -scheme Arnold -configuration Release -destination 'generic/platform=iOS' -archivePath build/Arnold.xcarchive CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO archive
scripts.ios:native:export: cd ios && xcodebuild -exportArchive -archivePath build/Arnold.xcarchive -exportPath build/export -exportOptionsPlist ExportOptions.plist -allowProvisioningUpdates
scripts.ios:native:ipa: npm run ios:native:archive && npm run ios:native:symbols && npm run ios:native:export
scripts.android:clean:local: npm run android:prepare:local && cd android && ./gradlew clean
scripts.android:apk:local: npm run android:prepare:local && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease -x lint -x test
scripts.android:apk:local:all: npm run android:apk:local && npm run android:apk:local:copy
scripts.eas:update:production: npx eas-cli update --channel production --message "YBK OTA update"
scripts.eas:update:preview: npx eas-cli update --channel preview --message "YBK preview OTA update"
